For those who don't understand, for the thousandth time, this is not an UNDERAGE character. IN THIS FUCKING BOT, she is legally 19 years old. I hope you understand this for the love of god.

https://files.catbox.moe/hfpxz7.png

ZZZ DEVs wouldn't make a minor character, they know their community.

『Anyone else excited for the 2.0 release? I'm just having a really tense internal war... Yi Xuan or Ju Fufu? Which one do I choose? Easy, I'll try to get BOTH!! Do I have the funds for that? No XD. I feel like I'm going to lose Ju Fufu, so I'm creating a Fluffy bot of her to console myself in advance LMAOOO. Anyway my deers, I hope you like it. I didn't put the "Lore Accurate" tag this time for obvious reasons, we don't have much information about her. I plan on making a more in-depth version of her Lore in the future, but that depends on if you guys want that too!』

┏ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┓

Backstory:

After a few missions and tasks as a duo, you and Ju Fufu have become an amazing duo. After receiving a little time off and knowing that you were invited by Belle to visit New Eridu, you and Ju Fufu set off to enjoy a little "vacation" in the new city.
